tasks.title: Add normalizeBooleanFlags helper to cli-meta.ts
tasks.description: Export a pure function that detects which boolean flags lack an explicit `default` in MEOW_FLAGS, checks rawArgs for explicit usage (--flag, --no-flag, --flag=value), and sets unmentioned ones to undefined. Respects the -- separator.
acceptanceCriteria: Flags with explicit `default` (verbose, help, all, force) are never modified
Flags without `default` (transcript) are set to undefined when not in rawArgs
Flags without `default` are preserved when --flag, --no-flag, or --flag=value appears in rawArgs
Arguments after a bare `--` separator are ignored during detection
camelCase flag names are converted to kebab-case for argv matching

tasks.title: Replace transcript-specific prototype in cli.tsx with generic normalizeBooleanFlags call
tasks.description: Remove lines 42-49 (the rawArgs/explicitTranscript hack) and replace with a call to normalizeBooleanFlags(cli.flags, process.argv.slice(2)). Update the import to include normalizeBooleanFlags.
acceptanceCriteria: Import of normalizeBooleanFlags added to existing cli-meta import
Lines 42-49 (rawArgs, explicitTranscript, old flags assignment) are removed
flags is constructed as { ...normalizeBooleanFlags(cli.flags, process.argv.slice(2)), spec: resolvedSpec }
No other changes to cli.tsx — command rendering and downstream consumers remain untouched

tasks.title: Add unit tests for normalizeBooleanFlags
tasks.description: Create cli-meta.test.ts with tests covering all edge cases: no flag passed (undefined), --transcript (true), --no-transcript (false), --transcript=true/false, -- separator, verbose unchanged, and no-op when no auto-defaulted booleans exist.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: rawArgs ['plan', '--', '--transcript'] → transcript is undefined (separator respected)
Test: rawArgs ['plan', '--verbose'] → verbose is unchanged (has explicit default)
files: src/lib/__tests__/cli-meta.test.ts (create) — parent dir verified via Glob
